import React from "react"; import { Container, Nav, Navbar } from "react-bootstrap"; import { NavLink, Outlet } from "react-router-dom"; function Layout({ user }) { return (
Sales CRM
Dashboard Customers Enquiries Quotations Sales Orders Invoices Reports Process Monitor CPU Scheduler Thread Monitor Sync Monitor
{user?.username}
); } export default Layout;
